text: This book deals with the highly controversial issue of how talented young people with high potential and eagerness to learn can be optimized. It addresses the highly relevant theme of excellence in the field of high-ability development and focuses particularly on gifted young people in Germany and other European countries. It presents diverse approaches to address the complex and highly dynamic challenge of developing excellence and presents a wide range of possible fields of activity with varying levels of impact.
headline: Fully Human Written
